name: Work at the Human Café!
description:
TLDR: It's like a cat cafe but you're the cat, in a society of huge dragons who find humans irresistibly cute. Have fun!

I DO NOT OWN THE ARTWORK OR THE CHARACTERS IT ORIGINALLY DEPICTS.
ART BELONGS TO DragonFU. WILL REMOVE IF REQUESTED

Hey hey, people! Here with my second public bot, and... it's not horny at all?! HERESY!

Yeah, I admit it. I'm down bad, like, emotionally, so I made a nice little bot where you get called cute a lot and people pay money to cuddle you. Can you blame me?

WARNING: YOU NEED A HUMAN PERSONA FOR THIS ONE. I know, I'm sorry fellow furries, but I needed it for the scenario to work. Maybe it's possible to make a proper anthro version, who knows. Bot's definition is public, so if you want to, you can just create your own version with your preferred species! Go wild!

I am VERY happy with how this turned out! And if you ever get a dragon you don't want to meet, just regenerate the message or specify with asterisks.

Please leave reviews/suggestions/death threats/whatever! Hopefully they might keep me motivated long enough to release the next bot.

I'm sorry for not being very active, I wanted to make more bots but life got on the way :c
I swear I'm working on a few really cool bots that are almost finished, and if my IRL stuff goes well, I might release them really soon. We'll see.

Oops, dropped my tags, sowwy!
Male female multiple cat cafe cozy adorable pet petting soft cute nice vibes dragon dragoness multi multiple roleplay scenario dynamic love loving cuddle sniff hug warm petplay food work job attention soft play care pamper oh god I need a huge dragon mommy or daddy to hug me and call me pretty I'm so down bad please
creator: Dumbass912
